name: arrs
description: The *arr / media-automation stack in one plugin: Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Overseerr, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Plex, Jellyfin, Tautulli, and Tracearr — each operated via its own REST API. Credentials are configured here and bridged to the skills via a generated env file.

radarr_url.title: Radarr URL
radarr_url.description: Radarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:7878 (no trailing slash).

radarr_default_quality_profile.title: Radarr default quality profile
radarr_default_quality_profile.description: Quality profile id used when adding movies.

sonarr_url.title: Sonarr URL
sonarr_url.description: Sonarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8989 (no trailing slash).

sonarr_default_quality_profile.title: Sonarr default quality profile
sonarr_default_quality_profile.description: Quality profile id used when adding series.

prowlarr_url.title: Prowlarr URL
prowlarr_url.description: Prowlarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:9696 (no trailing slash).

overseerr_url.title: Overseerr URL
overseerr_url.description: Overseerr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:5055 (no trailing slash).

sabnzbd_url.title: SABnzbd URL
sabnzbd_url.description: SABnzbd base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080 (no trailing slash).

qbittorrent_url.title: qBittorrent URL
qbittorrent_url.description: qBittorrent WebUI base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080 (no trailing slash).

plex_url.title: Plex URL
plex_url.description: Plex Media Server base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:32400.

jellyfin_url.title: Jellyfin URL
jellyfin_url.description: Jellyfin base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8096 (no trailing slash).

jellyfin_api_key.title: Jellyfin API key
jellyfin_api_key.description: Jellyfin API key (Dashboard → API Keys), sent as X-Emby-Token.

tautulli_url.title: Tautulli URL
tautulli_url.description: Tautulli base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:8181.

tracearr_url.title: Tracearr URL
tracearr_url.description: Tracearr base URL for its public API, e.g. http://localhost:3000 (no trailing slash).
